transcription.text: Remember when people started using Safeguard deodorant soap? They didn't know any better, because there was nothing better to know. Today, there's something better to know. New deodorant Safeguard, with twice the lather of any other deodorant soap. But not just rich lather, this is deodorant lather. No other leaving soap gives you more deodorant protection. New deodorant Safeguard, with twice the lather of any other deodorant soap.
